---
title: "debug_fishtest_phase2.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/debug/debug_fishtest_phase2.py"
loc: 54
complexity: 8
logic_score: 2.70
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 5.84
overall_score: 4.53
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating FishtestDiagnostic, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import FishtestDiagnostic and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 15 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `FishtestDiagnostic`
- `execute`
